title: NoNarrator
description: A simple mod that disables the narrator feature in Minecraft.
body:
**NOTE:
As of Minecraft 1.20.2 this mod is obsolete.** Mojang added a feature to the base game that can be toggled to disable the narrator hotkey. In the accessibility settings you can find a setting called "Narrator Hotkey", if you disable it the narrator will no longer toggle with the CTRL+B hotkey.

A simple mod that disables the narrator feature in Minecraft.

Have something binded to 'B' in Minecraft and when you press it you keep accidentally pressing 'CTRL' at the same time? I have, so I decided to make this simple mod to disable the annoying sound and toast that comes when you press 'CTRL' + 'B' at the same time.
